WITH initializeAggregation('sumState', number) AS one_row_sum_state SELECT number, finalizeAggregation(one_row_sum_state) AS one_row_sum FROM test_numbers;

WITH (SELECT countState(number) FROM test_numbers) AS state_count, (SELECT sumState(number) FROM test_numbers) AS state_sum SELECT finalizeAggregation(state_count) AS total_count, finalizeAggregation(state_sum) AS total_sum;
CREATE TABLE aggregated_numbers AS SELECT number, sumState(number) AS sum_state FROM test_numbers GROUP BY number;
SELECT number, finalizeAggregation(sum_state) AS final_sum FROM aggregated_numbers GROUP BY number;
SELECT finalizeAggregation(initializeAggregation('avgState', number)) AS average_value FROM test_numbers WHERE number > 5;
WITH initializeAggregation('sumState', number) AS sum_state SELECT number, finalizeAggregation(sum_state) AS total_sum FROM test_numbers WHERE number < 8 GROUP BY number;
